mapper.update: update store_menu set menu_category_idx = #{menuCategoryIdx}, menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_description = #{menuDescription}, menu_price = #{menuPrice}, menu_status = #{menuStatus}, display_order = #{displayOrder} where store_idx = #{storeIdx} and menu_idx = #{menuIdx}
mapper.insert: insert into store_menu( store_idx, menu_category_idx, menu_name, menu_description, menu_price, menu_status, display_order ) values( #{storeIdx}, #{menuCategoryIdx}, #{menuName}, #{menuDescription}, #{menuPrice}, #{menuStatus}, #{displayOrder} )
mapper.select: <<<<<<< HEAD select menu_idx, store_idx, menu_name, menu_description, menu_price, menu_status, display_order, created_at, updated_at ======= select * >>>>>>> f912c3bdcbaa730126e1afc9ed59c4958613a12e from store_menu where store_idx = #{storeIdx} and menu_idx = #{menuIdx}

<<<<<<< HEAD select menu_idx, store_idx, menu_name, menu_description, menu_price, menu_status, display_order, created_at, updated_at ======= select * >>>>>>> f912c3bdcbaa730126e1afc9ed59c4958613a12e from store_menu where store_idx = #{storeIdx} and menu_name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

<<<<<<< HEAD select menu_idx, store_idx, menu_name, menu_description, menu_price, menu_status, display_order, created_at, updated_at ======= select * >>>>>>> f912c3bdcbaa730126e1afc9ed59c4958613a12e from store_menu where store_idx = #{storeIdx} and menu_status != 'HIDDEN' and menu_name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

<<<<<<< HEAD select menu_idx, store_idx, menu_name, menu_description, menu_price, menu_status, display_order, created_at, updated_at ======= select * >>>>>>> f912c3bdcbaa730126e1afc9ed59c4958613a12e from store_menu where store_idx = #{storeIdx} order by display_order, menu_idx

<<<<<<< HEAD select menu_idx, store_idx, menu_name, menu_description, menu_price, menu_status, display_order, created_at, updated_at ======= select * >>>>>>> f912c3bdcbaa730126e1afc9ed59c4958613a12e from store_menu where store_idx = #{storeIdx} and menu_status != 'HIDDEN' order by display_order, menu_idx
